title: Miconia heteroneura
taxonomy: Miconia heteroneura is a species of flowering plant in the Melastomataceae family. This family of plants is commonly known as the melastome or memecylid family. Miconia heteroneura is native to South America, particularly in the countries of Brazil and Peru. The classification of Miconia heteroneura is within the genus Miconia, which is a large and diverse group of plants. The exact classification of Miconia heteroneura within the genus Miconia is not specified, but it is generally known to be a part of the Melastomataceae family.
